category_sources: source_facts.description says GUI for computational chemistry packages; official Gabedit website describes a graphical user interface for computational chemistry packages and molecular visualization.
display_name_sources: Official Gabedit website and SourceForge project title use Gabedit; source_facts.name is gabedit.
docs_sources: Official Gabedit website links Manual and Tutorial pages; SourceForge project files include ManualGabedit.pdf under Documentations.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge Gabedit project has a Code tab leading to the project source tree at /p/gabedit/code/HEAD/tree/.
tags_sources: Official Gabedit website lists molecule building, computational chemistry package input generation, molecular orbital/surface display, spectra, animations, and crystallography tools.
